display_name: OpenAI's most powerful image generation model. Generates high quality images with intricate details based on the user's most recent prompt. For most prompts, https://poe.com/FLUX-pro-1.1-ultra or http
description:
OpenAI's most powerful image generation model. Generates high quality images with intricate details based on the user's most recent prompt. For most prompts, https://poe.com/FLUX-pro-1.1-ultra or https://poe.com/FLUX-dev or https://poe.com/Imagen3 will produce better results. 

Optional parameters:
Aspect Ratio to select an aspect ratio. Valid aspect ratios are 1:1, 7:4, & 4:7.
